notableEvents.label: Alex Freeland GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alex Freeland grounds into a double play, pitcher Dustin May to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Hyeseong Kim out at 2nd. Alex Freeland out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Freddie Freeman GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Freddie Freeman grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Shohei Ohtani out at 2nd. Freddie Freeman out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: JJ Wetherholt reaches on a missed catch error by pitcher Justin Wrobleski, assist to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Andy Pages GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages grounds into a double play, second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Dalton Rushing out at 2nd. Andy Pages out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Miguel Rojas walks.

notableEvents.label: Shohei Ohtani plunked
notableEvents.detail: Shohei Ohtani hit by pitch. Miguel Rojas to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Dalton Rushing GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Dalton Rushing grounds into a double play, first baseman Alec Burleson to shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Max Muncy out at 2nd. Dalton Rushing out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andy Pages reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages reaches on a fielding error by shortstop Masyn Winn.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Pedro Pagés challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Andy Pages steals (5) 2nd base.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas grounds out, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Andy Pages to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call singles on a ground ball to left fielder José Fermín. Andy Pages scores.
